creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Brian

Could you please:

- Remove the need for DISTNAME/DISTFILES by using DISTVERSIONSUFFIX (=4)

- Confirm that the changes/port pass QA (portlint and poudriere in particular). For testing details and instructions, see:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/testing.html

After running through QA and addressing the above and any other issues identified:

- Replace the existing attachment with a unified diff (via svn diff or similar) against the existing port version, rather than a tarball of the files.
